subject: Renaming openecomp to onap
commit_message:
Renaming openecomp to onap

Changing the name from openecomp to ONAP affected the docker build
scripts.

Issue-ID: AAI-208
Change-Id: I7588c80ed8629d735a271d54fe9ea7614544aebc
Signed-off-by: Arul.Nambi <arul.nambi@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ci-management-jjb-verify/875/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ci-management-jjb-verify/875

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This change will affect several repos that use this script. 

Have you checked with the teams if this change can go in ?

Patch Set 1:

> This change will affect several repos that use this script.
 > 
 > Have you checked with the teams if this change can go in ?

I have checked with the following teams
aai-sparky-be-master-aai-docker-java-daily
aai-data-router-master-aai-docker-java-daily
aai-model-loader-master-aai-docker-java-daily
aai-aai-service-release-1.0.0-aai-docker-java-daily
aai-model-loader-release-1.0.0-aai-docker-java-daily
aai-search-data-service-master-aai-docker-java-daily
Can I add if conditions to make the changes only for certain projects because I don’t want the vnfsdk-refrepo-master-aai-docker-java-daily to be included.

Patch Set 1:

this is tricky, I don't think is a good idea to put static conditions on repos. Specially since all the company went and agreed on the same rename of repos. Do you know why vnfsdk-refrepo-master-aai-docker-java-daily is not in favor of this?

Patch Set 1:

> this is tricky, I don't think is a good idea to put static
 > conditions on repos. Specially since all the company went and
 > agreed on the same rename of repos. Do you know why
 > vnfsdk-refrepo-master-aai-docker-java-daily is not in favor of
 > this?

That project is not a part of AAI. It is under its under vnfsdk
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/admin/projects/vnfsdk/refrepo
That is why I want to avoid it. I am not sure why refrepo of vnfsdk is linked to AAI

Patch Set 1:

vnfsdk/cli use aai-docker-java-daily jjb template, because the jjb template uses maven spotify plugin to build the docker.Other modules in ECOMP use different plugin to the build the docker.

Patch Set 1:

> vnfsdk/cli use aai-docker-java-daily jjb template, because the jjb
 > template uses maven spotify plugin to build the docker.Other
 > modules in ECOMP use different plugin to the build the docker.
Hi Murali,

 > vnfsdk/cli use aai-docker-java-daily jjb template, because the jjb
 > template uses maven spotify plugin to build the docker.Other
 > modules in ECOMP use different plugin to the build the docker.
Hi Murali,
Thanks for the information. I could not find the project vnfsdk/cli in gerrit. Do you know who is the PTL for that? Also if its an ecomp component, should it not be changed from openecomp to onap?
regards
Arul

Patch Set 1:

vnfsdk/refrepo and cli, there are two projects which use this jjb template.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

Will get this change now merged since we completed the first release. We are trying to get all teams to move to "onap" now, this change should be good to go now.
Change has been successfully merged by Jessica Wagantall
